codeReview.summary: The existing report was stale. Current HEAD and the mission handoff show this feature is actually the cross-area integration validation commit `36dec3c`, not the earlier freshness-only recharacterization commit. The implementation is test-only and directly covers the remaining milestone assertions in `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`: alias and token-list continuity, fresh-bootstrap behavior, stale freshness gating, first-visit R0 coverage, SemVer/version checks, CeFi/DeFi USD price coherence for an overlapping token, and compatibility-audit linkage. The current test file at HEAD matches the commit intent and no blocking defects were found in the reviewed feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior scrutiny report for this feature referenced a different historical commit and a different feature scope than the mission metadata now assigns. Review artifacts can drift from mission feature mappings when follow-up features are renamed or repointed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission `features.json` does not contain `compatibility-live-data-freshness-followup`, while `compatibility-hardening` maps the completed worker session `50dd81b3-83ca-4970-bc2e-adc84b6f1b2d` to `cross-area-integration-validation`; the handoff at `/home/whoami/.factory/missions/f3507a1f-9e14-4c7c-a7d4-636d4909f2b3/handoffs/2026-03-27T16-02-27-344Z__cross-area-integration-validation__50dd81b3-83ca-4970-bc2e-adc84b6f1b2d.json` records commit `36dec3c`, but the old review file pointed to `beb797e8...`.

summary: Updated the stale scrutiny report to match current mission evidence. Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, commit `36dec3c`, and current HEAD `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`; the feature passes review as a test-only cross-area compatibility hardening change with no code issues found.
